priorities.title: Charter extraction: pickRedundantBondTargets + angularDistance to src/input/redundantBondTargets.ts (mechanical, zero behavior change, closes S14 § XV PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) Mechanical extract: angularDistance (controls.ts:449-458 pre-S15) + pickRedundantBondTargets (controls.ts:460-534 pre-S15) moved verbatim to new src/input/redundantBondTargets.ts. Zero behavior change. (2) controls.ts dropped 565 -> 479 LOC (-86; under 500 § XV soft charter). redundantBondTargets.ts at 102 LOC. (3) New file imports only `type { PrimitiveId, Vec2 } from '../types.ts'`. (4) controls.ts single-line import added. angularDistance not imported in controls.ts (only used internally by pickRedundantBondTargets). (5) Wrapper redundantBondTargetsInSameComponent unchanged. (6) session14.test.ts import path switched. All 29 tests + 5 angularDistance tests re-resolve via new path. (7) vitest run 252/252; typecheck clean. (8) Same Micro pattern as S14 P2.0. (9) Commit b9c4b20 pushed to origin/master.

priorities.title: Networked 1v1 MVP — Trystero/Nostr WebRTC, host-authoritative 10Hz NetSnapshot + linear lerp interpolation + per-direction sequence numbers, title screen (1P/1v1), lobby with 6-char room codes, Connection-lost UI overlay (no host-migration v1), solo mode preserved
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) Phase-2 networking landed per LOCKED § 1 user-authorized amendment. Council R1+R2 closed: Trystero/Nostr (Grok conceded; multi-strategy fallback negates rate-limit concern) + 'Connection lost' UI overlay v1 (Gemini wins; host-migration deferred to S16). (2) New files: src/net/transport.ts (103 LOC NetTransport wrapping trystero/nostr joinRoom), src/net/protocol.ts (83 LOC discriminated-union envelopes + room code gen/parse), src/net/sync.ts (146 LOC HostSync seq emit + ClientSync seq receive + lerp interpolate), src/net/lerp.ts (15 LOC clamp utility), src/render/titleScreen.ts (144 LOC 1P/1v1 mode select), src/render/lobbyScreen.ts (289 LOC host/join panes + connection-lost overlay). (3) Schema: Player.avatarPos (Vec2); World gains gameMode ('solo'|'1v1'), currentPlayerId, scoreByPlayer: Map<PlayerId,number>, isHost. New actions START_GAME / END_TURN / RETURN_TO_TITLE / UPDATE_AVATAR_POS. PICKUP_SPARK + PLACE_PRIMITIVE + DROP_SPARK reject when 1v1 + action.playerId !== currentPlayerId (Gemini R1 BLOCKER input sanitization). (4) addScore helper: solo additive (test contract preserved); 1v1 per-player tracking with scoreProgress = max(scoreByPlayer.values()) for WIN gate. (5) save.ts: WorldSnapshot extended (gameMode + currentPlayerId + scoreByPlayer optional for pre-S15 compat). New exports netSnapshot() and applyNetSnapshot(). SerializedPlayer.avatarPos optional. (6) controls.ts: ControlsDispatchFn injected (default makeLocalDispatcher for back-compat). 3 dispatch sites switched to this.dispatchFn. playerId mutable via setPlayerId for client joining as P2. Space key handler: END_TURN with auto-release per PRIME-AUDIT #4. (7) main.ts: boots TITLE; titleScreen + lobbyScreen instantiated; net lifecycle via lobby callbacks. Snapshot emission gated on host PLAYING every SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL_TICKS=6. Client physics skipped; client interpolation per render frame. (8) ui.ts: HUD turn indicator, per-player score readouts, connection status dot. WIN banner uses winner's player color. (9) Tests: 39 new (overshot target 25) — protocol.test (9 room code gen/parse), sync.test (16 HostSync seq + ClientSync receive/reject + lerp01 + interpolatePositions), session15.test (14 FSM extension + hotseat reject + END_TURN + addScore + winner attribution + RETURN_TO_TITLE + save roundtrip + pre-S15 backwards-compat). (10) Verification: typecheck clean; vitest 291/291 (252 prior + 39 new); LOC: world.ts 357 (over 280 trip-wire — S16 carry-forward), controls.ts 542 (under 600 trip-wire), transport+protocol+sync+lerp = 347 (over 160 trip-wire combined — accepted, feature-coherent). (11) Bundle size delta +~40KB (trystero) per Council R2. (12) Known v1 limits documented in LOCKED § 13.7. (13) Commit add497f pushed to origin/master.

priorities.check_method: Closeout artifacts complete: BACKLOG.md S15 entry inserted above S14 (~140 LOC with full P1/P2/P3 narrative + Council R1+R2 disposition + PRIME-AUDIT delta + S16 carry-forward block). reflexion_log.md prepended with 5 S15 entries (#user-amendment-mid-session-as-2nd-council-cycle, #locked-decision-amendment-via-user-authority, #council-r2-converges-disagreements-not-restarts, #test-contract-as-implementation-surface, SESSION #trip-wire-as-judgment-signal-not-hard-gate); pruned 5 S7 entries (silhouette-rewrite + skip-deliberation + tab-pause-mutate + zone-aware-test-coords + structure-renderer-tick-plumbing — silhouettes superseded by S12 per-kind split; skip-deliberation by S13 explicit-go + S15 amendment cycle; tab-pause by S8 #headless-render-needs-game-loop; zone-aware well-internalized; tick-plumbing now-canonical) to maintain ≤50 cap; footer pruning note updated. boot-snapshot.md regenerated with S15 commit list, post-S15 state, new § XV charter PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward (world.ts 357 LOC over 280 trip-wire), and S15+S14 reflexion summaries. PDR moved to .claude/plans-archive/2026-05-12_PDR_Session_15_COMPLETED.md (full Battle Ledger R1+R2 + Council R2 outcome table + PRIME-AUDIT delta + spec amendments list + approval gate record). LOCKED_DECISIONS amendments applied per Council R2 + PRIME-AUDIT adopt-list: § 1 row split into Phase-2 net (Trystero ^0.20) + Phase-3 net (Colyseus reserved); § 7 module-map adds src/net/ block + new screens + redundantBondTargets.ts; § 10.2 dispatcher-injection + input-sanitization note; § 10.4 NetSnapshot wire variant note; NEW § 13 'Phase-2 Networked Play v1' (8 subsections: 13.1 transport, 13.2 authority model, 13.3 sync protocol, 13.4 lobby, 13.5 FSM extension, 13.6 per-player scoring, 13.7 known v1 limitations, 13.8 constants). Final state: 291/291 tests passing (252 prior + 9 protocol.test + 16 sync.test + 14 session15.test). Typecheck clean. § XV charter: world.ts 357 LOC (new S16 carry-forward), placePrimitive.ts 492 LOC, controls.ts 542 LOC (under 600 trip-wire), redundantBondTargets.ts 102 LOC, net layer 347 LOC combined. 3 priority commits (b9c4b20 P1, add497f P2, 81dfc84 P3 closeout) on origin/master, all pushed.
